calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order

To Determine Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order

To Determine Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Continued To Feb-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Roger Gross for Edwin Mah (Executor).

Mr. Gross reported that he has a copy of the Wells Fargo bank statement confirming the account number. The Court instructed counsel to file an amendment or supplement to correct the account number. Notice issue with regard to Mr. Anderson's children was addressed. The Court noted that there was an earlier order dispensing with notice to the heirs and it does not have any issue with the US Bank account. The matter was continued to February 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of additional pleading to clarify the issue of the Wells Fargo account.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross for Edwin Mah.

The Court addressed the issue of the missing heirs. Mr. Gross stated that nothing had surfaced on the addresses, that Mr. Anderson left at 24 years of age in the early 50's, that he reinvented himself at that time (new name, etc.), that he never maintained contact with his children, that the only address they had was for his daughter in Nipomo, and that the mail sent to her at that address had been returned. In addition, Mr. Gross stated that because Mr. Anderson had reinvented himself that he had no starting point in which to proceed with the searches, that Mr. Anderson did have an address book but that it did not contain any information with regard to his children, that he has published the notice, that he did communicate with an heir search organization, and that he did not have Mr. Anderson's previous social security number. Having considered all the circumstances, the Court then granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Continued To Aug-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testatmentary was continued to July 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Jul-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross for Edwin Mah.

Mr. Gross stated that they have an understanding of who some of the Heirs are, but that they do not know where they are. Mr. Gross also provided family history, stated that hiring an Heir hunter would be very expensive, that he communicated with Rosanna Young (Aunt/Matriarch), that she does not know where the Heirs are and that they are at a loss. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to July 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to obtain a declaration from Ms. Young and file a declaration reflecting what he stated in Court.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
